insight: The external-mute check for chat (LiteBans via HookManager.isMuted) sits outside the Settings.Mute.ENABLED gate in Mute.checkChatMute, so it blocks chat with the command-mute-cannot-chat-player-muted message even when Mute.Enabled is false, and it ignores chatcontrol.bypass.mute. The {player_unmute_remaining_short} placeholder falls back to HookManager.getUnmuteTime when no ChatControl mute record exists, so timed LiteBans mutes render their remaining time.

Before the #3788 fix, PrivateMessage.send performed no external-mute check, so /tell, /reply and conversation mode let LiteBans-muted players through silently; with Mute.Enabled false all command mute checks are no-ops, meaning any silent /msg block came from LiteBans' own command blocking. Also note /tell and /reply commands are only registered when Private_Messages.Enabled is true, so with it false ChatControl never handles /msg at all.
